etymology.description: 立(立) (lì, "to stand") provides the meaning + 矣(矣) (yǐ) provides the sound
etymology.interpretation: The character 竢 incorporates 立(立) (lì, "to stand") as the semantic component, implying a sense of remaining in place or waiting, combined with the phonetic component 矣(矣) (yǐ) to suggest its pronunciation.
